tool_args.label: Capital Program Committee Meeting Book - October 2023

payload.title: Capital Program Committee Meeting
payload.description: Capital Program Committee Meeting book for October 2023, including meeting minutes, safety reports, capital program commitments and completions, funding status, and procurement actions

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: MTA Construction & Development
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development

payload.description: Construction & Development company (C&D) of the MTA

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Construction & Development proposes to award

payload.description: Capital Program Committee Meeting held October 2023 at 2 Broadway, 20th Floor Board Room, New York, NY
MTA Capital Program Committee Meeting held on September 18, 2023 at 12:45 P.M. in New York, NY. Meeting adjourned at 2:47 PM.

tool_args.label: CBTC Queens Boulevard Line Phase I
tool_args.raw_text: Contract S-48004-1 requires Siemens Mobility, Inc. to provide wayside Communication Based Train Control equipment on the Queens Boulevard West Line

payload.project_name: CBTC Queens Boulevard Line (QBL) Phase I
payload.description: Communications Based Train Control on Queens Boulevard West Line. Modification to contract with Siemens Mobility to resolve claims and extend Substantial Completion date to December 31, 2024.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Terminal Fire Standpipe Replacement Phase II
tool_args.raw_text: second phase of the replacement of the Grand Central Terminal Fire Standpipe system

payload.project_name: Grand Central Terminal Fire Standpipe Replacement Phase II
payload.description: Replacement and upgrade of fire standpipe system on the Upper Level of Grand Central Terminal train shed. Phase 1 completed Lower Level. Brings system into compliance with current fire code.
In 2023 the MTA planned to commit $10 billion worth of capital projects
Through September 2023, the MTA has committed $2.537 billion versus a $7.111 billion YTD goal

tool_args.label: MTA 2023 Completions Goal
tool_args.raw_text: In 2023 the MTA plans to complete $10.4 billion of projects.

payload.description: MTA plans to complete $10.4 billion of projects in 2023

tool_args.label: MTA 2023 Completions Through September
tool_args.raw_text: Through September, the MTA has completed $4,961 million versus its year-to-date goal of $7,969 million.

tool_args.label: Stations Program Budget
tool_args.raw_text: The Stations Program, with a total budget of $11 billion, comprises 219 active projects

payload.description: Stations Program total budget

tool_args.label: CPC Work Plan Changes - Quarterly Presentations
tool_args.raw_text: staff has proposed changes to the CPC Work Plan to incorporate quarterly presentations on important agency-wide priority initiatives, beginning with the Twenty-Year Needs Assessment at next month's meeting

payload.claim_text: staff has proposed changes to the CPC Work Plan to incorporate quarterly presentations on important agency-wide priority initiatives, beginning with the Twenty-Year Needs Assessment at next month's meeting
payload.description: Proposed revisions to the Capital Program Committee Work Plan to include quarterly presentations on agency-wide priority initiatives

tool_args.label: Roosevelt Island Tram OMNY Launch
tool_args.raw_text: the Roosevelt Island Tram came into the OMNY System as the first OMNY Tap-and-Go subscriber, with others -- including PANYNJ Air Train -- anticipated to follow in the very near future

payload.claim_text: the Roosevelt Island Tram came into the OMNY System as the first OMNY Tap-and-Go subscriber, with others -- including PANYNJ Air Train -- anticipated to follow in the very near future
payload.description: Roosevelt Island Tram became first OMNY Tap-and-Go subscriber

tool_args.label: Safety Incidents September 2023
tool_args.raw_text: 27 safety incidents were reported in September 2023, including: Eight (8) lost time incidents, Six (6) recordable incidents

payload.description: Safety incidents reported in September 2023

tool_args.label: Lost Time Incidents YTD 2023
tool_args.raw_text: 43 Lost Time incidents have been reported YTD (through September 30, 2023), a decrease of 12% (or six (6) incidents) vs. the same reporting period in 2022

payload.description: Lost Time incidents YTD through September 2023

tool_args.label: Recordable Incidents YTD 2023
tool_args.raw_text: 45 Recordable incidents have been reported YTD (through September 30, 2023), an increase of 2% (or one (1) incidents) vs. the same reporting period in 2022

payload.description: Recordable incidents YTD through September 2023

tool_args.label: ADA Station Completions Per Year
tool_args.raw_text: C&D has pursued ADA Station completions, which have averaged 10 per year since 2020 versus 4 per year in the 30 years prior

payload.raw_value_text: 10 per year since 2020 versus 4 per year in the 30 years prior
payload.description: ADA station completion rate since 2020 compared to historical rate

tool_args.label: Accessibility Share of Stations Program
tool_args.raw_text: slightly more than half the program (i.e., $6 billion) is made up of projects aimed at expanding accessibility

payload.description: Accessibility expansion portion of the $11 billion Stations Program

tool_args.label: October 2023 Procurement Actions
tool_args.raw_text: The Procurement Agenda this month includes 8 actions for a proposed expenditure of $98.3 M.

payload.description: Number and total value of procurement actions for October 2023

tool_args.label: Pelham Substation C-16 Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: design, fabrication, installation and testing of a new prefabricated substation to replace the Pelham (C-16) substation located on the southern side of Willson's Woods Park, in Mt. Vernon, NY

payload.project_name: Replacement of Mobile Substation C-16 (Pelham Substation)
payload.location: Willson's Woods Park, Mt. Vernon, NY
payload.description: Design, fabrication, installation and testing of new prefabricated substation to replace Pelham C-16 substation on New Haven Line. Critical to ensuring reliability of DC traction supply system. Contract awarded to Verde Electric Corporation at $32,617,134.35 for 36 months.

location_normalized.raw_text: Willson's Woods Park, Mt. Vernon, NY

tool_args.label: R211 CBTC Equipment - 8th Avenue Line
tool_args.raw_text: communication-based train control equipment for New York City Transit's R211 subway cars that will operate on the 8th Avenue Line

payload.project_name: R211 CBTC Equipment for Communication Based Train Control on the Eighth Avenue Line
payload.description: Exercise of Option 2 to Contract S-48013 for additional R211 CBTC equipment from Thales for 89 additional R211 units at $10,123,326, for CBTC on NYCT's 8th Avenue Line.

tool_args.label: Program and Project Controls Policies
tool_args.raw_text: developing new program and project controls policies, processes and procedures

payload.project_name: MTA C&D Program and Projects Controls Policies, Processes and Procedures
payload.description: Contract to Turner & Townsend Inc. for developing new program and project controls policies for MTA C&D. Base contract $3,711,049.38 for 12 months, with two optional extensions totaling up to $5,415,669.69.

tool_args.label: State of Good Repair Work at Various Stations
tool_args.raw_text: The Contract is for the design and construction of structural repairs and replacements in 43 New York City Transit stations in the Boroughs of Manhattan and Brooklyn

payload.project_name: Progressive Design-Build Services for State of Good Repair Work at Various Stations
payload.description: Design and construction of structural repairs in 43 NYCT stations in Manhattan and Brooklyn, including steel columns, beams, concrete platform edges, stairs, canopies, finishes, and water leak mitigation. Phase 1 design at $35,312,421

tool_args.label: CBTC General Engineering Consultant Services
tool_args.raw_text: design, engineering, procurement support and program administration services to assist the MTA in implementing the next phase of its CBTC program for NYCT subway services

payload.project_name: General Engineering Consultant Services for NYCT Communications Based Train Control Program
payload.description: Modification to Atkins-HNTB JV contract for additional engineering tasks to support CBTC for NYCT subway system, including work train CBTC equipping strategy, DCS replacement feasibility, R142/R142A retrofit evaluation, installed CBTC system analysis, and interface standard modernization.

tool_args.label: CBTC QBL West Phase 1 - Thales Modification
tool_args.raw_text: Contract S-48004-2 requires Thales to provide wayside CBTC equipment on the Queens Boulevard West Line... modification to resolve claims for added work for a total cost of $1,500,000 and extend the Substantial Completion Date

payload.claim_text: Modification to Contract S-48004-2 with Thales to resolve claims for added work at $1,500,000 extending Substantial Completion from March 31, 2021 to August 31, 2022 (the date achieved)
payload.description: Modification to resolve Thales claims including CBTC system changes from MTA interface standard updates, additional database releases, and zone controller capacity expansion

tool_args.label: Penn Station Reconstruction Status
tool_args.raw_text: progress on Penn reconstruction, currently in preliminary engineering in anticipation of 30% design completion

payload.claim_text: Progress on Penn reconstruction, currently in preliminary engineering in anticipation of 30% design completion
payload.description: Status update on Penn Station reconstruction project
